title: EVMs secured under tight guard in Salem
summary: Sealed EVMs and VVPATs moved to strong rooms with three-layer security and CCTV monitoring ahead of counting scheduled on May 4.

title: High voter turnout recorded across Salem district
summary: Officials reported around 90% voter turnout in Salem constituencies, reflecting strong public participation during recent Tamil Nadu assembly elections.

title: EPS meets candidates in Salem post polling
summary: AIADMK leader Edappadi Palaniswami met Salem candidates, reviewed campaign efforts and discussed alliance coordination following completion of polling.

title: Multi-layer security deployed at counting centers
summary: Central forces and state police deployed across Salem strong rooms with strict entry protocols and continuous surveillance until vote counting concludes.

title: Polling booth clash investigated by police
summary: Authorities continue inquiry into altercation between party agents and voters during polling at a Salem booth, ensuring election code compliance.

title: Heatwave concerns rise across Salem region
summary: Rising temperatures nearing 40°C raise public health concerns, with officials advising precautions during peak summer conditions in interior Tamil Nadu districts.

title: Heat stress risks flagged during election season
summary: Experts warn prolonged outdoor exposure during election activities increases heatstroke risks, urging better public safety measures in hot conditions.

title: Police honor officer who died on poll duty
summary: Special Sub-Inspector from Salem district who collapsed during election duty was honored with full state police rites.

title: Traffic movement monitored during EVM transport
summary: Authorities tracked convoy movement transporting voting machines across Salem using GPS and ensured uninterrupted traffic flow during operations.

title: Strong rooms equipped with surveillance systems
summary: Salem counting centers installed high-security cameras and floodlighting systems to maintain strict monitoring and prevent tampering of election materials.

title: Political activity slows after campaign period
summary: Following end of election campaigning, Salem city witnessed reduced political gatherings as mandated silence period was enforced.

title: Police escort ensures safe transport of EVMs
summary: Armed police escorted EVM convoys across Salem district to prevent disruptions and ensure secure transfer to counting centers.

title: Election officials maintain entry logs at centers
summary: Authorities implemented strict entry and exit logs at Salem strong rooms to monitor all personnel accessing secured election storage facilities.

title: Political party agents monitor strong rooms
summary: Representatives from major parties stationed outside Salem counting centers to oversee safety and transparency of stored voting machines.

title: Counting preparations underway in Salem
summary: District officials finalize arrangements for vote counting scheduled in early May with strict adherence to election commission protocols.

title: Humidity adds to heat discomfort in Salem
summary: High humidity levels combined with rising temperatures intensify discomfort for residents across Salem and surrounding interior districts.

title: Residents advised to avoid peak sun hours
summary: Health officials urge Salem residents to limit outdoor exposure during midday hours due to increasing risk of heat-related illnesses.

title: Local businesses observe post-election lull
summary: Retail and commercial activity in Salem slows slightly after elections as political spending and campaign-related demand decline.

title: Public gatherings decrease after polling
summary: Salem witnesses reduced crowd movement and quieter streets following completion of election activities across the district.

title: Floodlights installed at security zones
summary: Authorities installed floodlights at Salem election storage facilities to ensure continuous visibility and enhanced nighttime monitoring.

title: CCTV monitoring intensified at key locations
summary: Continuous CCTV surveillance activated at Salem counting centers to ensure transparency and prevent unauthorized access.

title: Vehicle checks increased across Salem routes
summary: Police heightened vehicle inspections in Salem to ensure law and order during post-election period and prevent illegal transport.

title: Armed patrols deployed near election centers
summary: Security personnel conduct regular patrols around Salem counting centers to deter any untoward incidents.

title: Doctors warn of rising heatstroke cases
summary: Medical professionals in Salem caution increasing heatstroke risks as temperatures rise, urging hydration and precautionary measures.

title: Heat conditions impact daily routines
summary: Extreme heat affects outdoor work schedules and daily routines in Salem, prompting adjustments by workers and businesses.

title: Early morning activity increases in city
summary: Residents shift outdoor activities to early mornings and evenings to avoid intense daytime heat across Salem.

title: Restricted access enforced at strong rooms
summary: Only authorized officials allowed entry into Salem election storage areas under strict supervision and verification protocols.

title: Party cadres stationed outside centers
summary: Political party members remain stationed outside counting centers in Salem to observe handling of EVMs.

title: Officials maintain transparency measures
summary: Election authorities in Salem implement strict protocols to ensure transparency and accountability in post-poll processes.

title: Interior districts face rising temperatures
summary: Salem and nearby districts experience increasing temperatures, with forecasts indicating further heat escalation in coming days.

title: Citizens advised hydration amid heat
summary: Health authorities emphasize importance of hydration and protective measures for Salem residents during hot weather conditions.

title: Security barricades installed near centers
summary: Barricades placed around Salem counting locations to regulate movement and maintain secure perimeters.

title: Movement restrictions near election zones
summary: Traffic restrictions implemented around Salem counting centers to ensure safety and smooth operations.

title: Three-tier security system activated
summary: Central forces, state police and local personnel form layered security system at Salem election storage facilities.

title: Post-election calm returns to Salem
summary: City returns to routine activities after intense election period, with reduced political gatherings and quieter public spaces.

title: Small vendors report reduced sales
summary: Street vendors in Salem report slight drop in sales after election-related spending and campaign activities concluded.

title: Residents adapt to summer routines
summary: People adjust daily schedules, opting for indoor activities during peak heat hours across Salem city.

title: Hospitals prepare for summer cases
summary: Healthcare facilities in Salem ready to handle increase in heat-related illnesses as temperatures continue rising.

title: Extreme heat affects outdoor workers
summary: Construction and daily wage workers in Salem face challenges due to high temperatures and prolonged sun exposure.

title: Authorities issue heat safety advisories
summary: Local administration advises precautionary measures including hydration, protective clothing and avoiding direct sunlight exposure.

title: Evening markets see higher footfall
summary: Markets in Salem witness increased evening activity as residents avoid daytime heat and prefer cooler hours.

title: Public transport usage shifts timing
summary: Commuters in Salem adjust travel schedules, preferring early morning and late evening public transport services.

title: Round-the-clock monitoring continues
summary: Security agencies maintain continuous monitoring of election storage facilities in Salem until counting process concludes.

title: Residents remain alert post elections
summary: Public urged to report any suspicious activity around election centers to maintain peaceful environment in Salem.

title: Temporary facilities set up for counting
summary: Authorities establish temporary infrastructure at Salem counting centers to manage personnel and election logistics efficiently.

title: Schools used as election storage sites
summary: Several educational institutions in Salem repurposed as secure storage locations for EVMs and election materials.

title: Police maintain strict vigilance
summary: Law enforcement agencies in Salem continue heightened vigilance to ensure peaceful post-election environment.

title: Community resumes normal activities
summary: Residents gradually return to routine life after election period, with reduced political presence across Salem neighborhoods.

title: Forecast indicates hotter days ahead
summary: Meteorological predictions suggest Salem may experience further rise in temperatures entering early May period.

title: Authorities stress calm and vigilance
summary: Officials urge Salem residents to maintain calm and cooperate with security measures during post-election period.
